confirmed_publication_note: The official CRS title download page is labeled 2025 and states the set is current with changes made by the Seventy-fifth General Assembly at its First Extraordinary Session in August 2025.
source_boundary: The official CRS data page states the statutory database is available as SGML text files in a zip file. This confirmation uses the already preserved official SGML archive and does not claim that a newer SGML package was downloaded on this run.
